_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Headache Log

app.name: Headache Log
app.description: Offline Headache & Medication Tracker. Log headache episodes, triggers, pain scale, medication history, and clinical notes — all without an internet connection.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Track headache episodes, triggers, and medications — all offline.
features: Log daily headache episodes with date, time, duration, pain scale, and symptoms
Record activity and food/water triggers linked to each headache episode
Manage your full medication history, dosage schedule, and pharmacy contacts

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your records and reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local log files, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Headache Log (Mobile)
mobile.description: Headache tracking sheets optimised for mobile layouts.

tablet.name: Headache Log (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive headache and medication log sheets optimised for tablets.

desktop.name: Headache Log (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive headache and medication log sheets optimised for desktop.

pdf.csvShareText: Headache Log data exported as CSV

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Headache Log needs access to your camera to capture images for your health records.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Headache Log needs access to your photo library to attach images to your health records.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Headache Log needs microphone access when using the camera.
